tier_1_doctrine.constitution_excerpt: Front-door runtime entry preserves Persona Interface, Relay, and Steward as separate role planes.
tier_1_doctrine.kernel_excerpt: Relay emits a semantic-boundary packet; Steward routes from that packet without treating raw user wording or persona style as governed write authority.

target_files.content: Relay semantic-boundary packet; raw user wording is not direct system truth.
Steward routing envelope derived from Relay boundary packet.

tier_3_mission.objective: Route the Relay semantic-boundary packet to the lawful next system action while preserving role separation and authority limits.
tier_3_mission.task_payload: Recover Persona and Relay as mandatory ingress/egress boundaries for the single-carrier sequential runtime.
